title: Modules
smartAccountRequiredDesc: Module management is only available for Smart Accounts. Upgrade your EOA via EIP-7702 delegation.
noModulesInstalledDesc: Add modules to enhance your Smart Account with features like spending limits, session keys, and more.
uninstallWarning: Uninstalling this module will remove its functionality from your Smart Account. This action cannot be undone.
uninstallConfirm: Are you sure you want to uninstall this module?
confirmTransaction: Please confirm the transaction in your wallet
executorDesc: Add automation and special execution logic
eip7702Info: EIP-7702 delegates your EOA to a smart contract, enabling modules, gas sponsorship, and batch transactions while keeping your existing address.
setCodeWarning: This will send a type 0x04 (SetCode) transaction. Gas fee is required. The delegation is reversible.
signingAndSending: Signing authorization and sending SetCode transaction
delegationComplete: Your EOA has been delegated to the smart contract.
sessionKeyInfo: A session key is a temporary address that can sign transactions on your behalf, within the limits you set.
allowedContractsInfo: The session key can only interact with these contract addresses.
noFunctionsSelectedInfo: If none selected, all functions are allowed
spendingLimitsInfo: Set maximum value the session key can send per transaction.
sessionKeyWarning: The session key will be able to sign transactions on your behalf. Only create session keys for trusted dApps.
setTransactionLimits: Set transaction limits per time period
selectTokenInfo: Choose which token to limit. The spending limit will reset after each period.
maxAmountPerPeriod: Maximum amount that can be spent during each period.
resetPeriodInfo: How often the spending limit resets.
howItWorksDesc: Any transaction exceeding the remaining allowance will be blocked until the period resets.
hookAppliedWarning: The hook will be applied to all transactions. Make sure the limit is high enough for your normal usage.
addSignersInfo: Add wallet addresses that can sign transactions. You can add up to {{max}} signers.
setThresholdInfo: How many signers must approve each transaction?
securityTipDesc: Higher thresholds are more secure but require more coordination. A threshold of {{count}} (majority) is recommended for most use cases.
multiSigWarning: Once installed, every transaction will require {{count}} signature{{plural}} from the listed addresses. Make sure all signers have access to their wallets.
slippageDescription: Set the maximum price slippage allowed for swaps. Higher values allow trades in volatile markets but may result in worse prices.
dailySwapLimitDesc: Set the maximum total value that can be swapped in a 24-hour period. This protects your account from excessive trading.
reviewConfigDesc: Review your swap executor settings before installation.
swapNote: This executor allows automated swaps up to your daily limit. Ensure you trust the dApps you connect to.
maxStakePerPoolDesc: Set the maximum amount that can be staked in a single staking pool. This limits concentration risk in any single protocol.
dailyStakingLimitDesc: Set the maximum total amount that can be staked across all pools in a 24-hour period.
stakingTip: For Ethereum validator staking, consider setting limits in multiples of 32 ETH (the validator stake requirement).
reviewStakingConfig: Review your staking executor settings before installation.
stakingBenefits: This executor enables automated staking operations while protecting against excessive exposure to any single protocol.
stakingNote: Staking often involves lock-up periods. Ensure you understand the unstaking requirements of each protocol.
ltvDescription: Set the maximum ratio of borrowed value to collateral value. Higher LTV allows borrowing more but increases liquidation risk.
minHealthFactorDesc: Set the minimum health factor threshold. Transactions that would reduce health below this level will be rejected. A health factor below 1.0 means liquidation.
healthFactorMinWarning: Must be greater than 1.0 to maintain safety margin
dailyBorrowLimitDesc: Set the maximum amount that can be borrowed in a 24-hour period. This protects against excessive borrowing.
reviewLendingConfig: Review your lending executor settings before installation.
lendingWarning: DeFi lending carries risks including liquidation. Ensure you understand the protocols you interact with.
paymentRecipientDesc: Enter the address that will receive the recurring payments.
paymentAmountDesc: Set the amount to be transferred in each payment.
paymentScheduleDesc: Configure how often payments should occur and for how long.
reviewRecurringPaymentDesc: Review your recurring payment settings before installation.
recurringPaymentWarning: Once installed, payments will execute automatically. Ensure the account has sufficient balance.
passkey_biometrics: Uses device biometrics (Face ID, Touch ID, Windows Hello)
passkey_noPasswords: No passwords to remember or steal
passkey_sync: Syncs across your devices via iCloud/Google
passkeyImportant: Once enabled, you'll need your passkey to sign transactions. Make sure your device supports biometric authentication.
followDevicePrompts: Follow the prompts on your device to complete registration
troubleshoot_biometrics: Make sure your device supports biometric authentication
troubleshoot_setup: Check that you've set up Face ID, Touch ID, or Windows Hello
troubleshoot_browser: Try using a different browser (Chrome, Safari, Edge)
troubleshoot_incognito: Ensure you're not in incognito/private mode
dashboard.title: Smart Account
revokeDelegationDesc: This will remove the smart contract delegation from your EOA, reverting it to a standard account. All installed modules will stop working.
revokeDelegationWarning: This sends a SetCode transaction with the zero address, which removes delegation. Your account will lose access to module functionality.
revocationCompleteDesc: Your account has been reverted to a standard EOA.
revokeSessionKeyConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this session key? It will no longer be able to sign transactions on your behalf.
installByAddressDesc: Enter the contract address of a module not listed in the registry.
initDataHint: Hex-encoded initialization data for the module
moduleNameHint: A display name for this module
customModuleWarning: Custom modules are not verified. Only install modules from trusted sources.
entryPointDeposit.title: EntryPoint Deposit
entryPointDeposit.description: Deposit funds to the EntryPoint contract to pay gas for Smart Account transactions.
entryPointDeposit.info: EntryPoint deposits are used to pay gas for UserOperations. Without sufficient deposit, self-pay transactions will fail.
